name: Manaksia Steels Limited
summary: Manaksia Steels Limited manufactures and sells secondary steel products primarily for housing, industry, and infrastructure sectors in India and internationally. The company offers cold rolled sheets used in interior and exterior panels of automobiles, buses, and commercial vehicles; galvanized corrugated sheets for use in the rural housing sector and factory buildings; and galvanized plain sheets used in the manufacture of containers and water tanks. It also provides color coated coils and sheets for sale to construction, housing, consumer durable, and other industries. The company also exports its products. Manaksia Steels Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Kolkata, India.
